summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Venue Roles feature (Primary/Secondary role system). All backend APIs pass (19/19 tests). Frontend tests pass for Profile page, Admin Roles tab, and validation warnings.

issues: One venue shows as 'Unknown' due to orphaned venue_pricing record (venue_id: 6ec01d60-904a-4d21-a721-1d12f9faea68 exists in pricing but not in venues collection). This is a data issue, not a code bug.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up orphaned venue_pricing records where venue no longer exists (venue_id: 6ec01d60-904a-4d21-a721-1d12f9faea68)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test venue roles during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue roles collection starts empty. Backend API tests cover: services endpoint, CRUD operations, validation, primary uniqueness, category/type validation. Frontend tests verified: login flow, Profile button in header, Profile page with all sections (My Primary Roles, My Secondary Roles, All Venue Roles, Sign Up as Secondary form), validation warning display, Admin Roles tab with VenueRoleManager component.

backend_apis: GET /api/venue-roles/services - Returns venues with pricing > $0 as service offerings
POST /api/venue-roles - Creates roles with validation for category, type, duplicates, primary uniqueness
GET /api/venue-roles/employee/{id} - Returns roles for specific employee
GET /api/venue-roles/venue/{id} - Returns roles for specific venue
GET /api/venue-roles/validate/{id} - Validates secondary requirement for primaries
frontend_pages: Profile page at /profile - Shows My Profile header, primary roles, secondary roles, sign-up form, all venue roles overview
Profile button in SchedulingPage header - Visible and functional after login
Admin Roles tab - Shows VenueRoleManager with assign form and venue role cards
Validation warning - Shows when primary has no secondary elsewhere
